name: Honey Newtons
recipeInstructions:
1. For the cookie dough: Cream butter until well blended. Add cheese at room temperature and cream until well combined. Stir in flour and mix well.
2. Chill the dough.
3. To prepare filling, combine remaining ingredients. Simmer gently, stirring until the consistency of marmalade, about 15 minutes. Set aside to cool.
4. Roll dough 1/8 inch thick on a lightly floured board.
5. Cut into 2-inch circles.
6. Place one half of the circles about 1 inch apart on a lightly greased baking sheet.
7. Place 1 teaspoon filling in the center of each cookie.
8. Top each with another circle of dough.
9. Press edges with a fork to seal.
10. Prick the tops of the cookies in several places.
11. Bake at 350 degrees F for 15 minutes or until lightly browned.
12. Remove from racks and cool.
